# sqrt(L_k) for Lehmer's polynomial, L_k = |Res(L, x^(2^k)+1)|
# k = 1..12, exact integer arithmetic; 1 = defect rung
# 3, 31, 127 Mersenne (extension); 257, 65537 Fermat appear as factors;
# sqrt(L_9) = 1302851980779781121 is a 19-digit prime
# regenerate: python3 scripts/tower_census.py
